parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.playbook_id,
  p.company_id,
  p.playbook_name,
  p.source_file_name,
  p.source_file_path,
  p.status,
  p.playbook_perspective
FROM company_playbooks p
WHERE p.playbook_id = '{{ $json.playbookId }}'::uuid

UPDATE company_playbooks
SET 
  status = 'parsing',
  parsing_started_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE playbook_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.playbookId }}'::uuid
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO playbook_rules (
  playbook_id,
  clause_code,
  clause_name,
  category,
  ideal_position,
  minimum_position,
  maximum_position,
  fallback_position,
  rationale,
  negotiation_tips,
  talking_points,
  common_objections,
  counter_arguments,
  escalation_trigger,
  escalation_contact,
  requires_approval_below,
  importance_level,
  is_deal_breaker,
  is_non_negotiable,
  display_order,
  is_active,
  range_context,
  source_quote,
  quality_flags
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.playbook_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ ($json.clause_code || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.clause_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.category || "general").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.ideal_position || 5 }},
  {{ $json.minimum_position || 3 }},
  {{ $json.maximum_position || 10 }},
  {{ $json.fallback_position || 5 }},
  {{ ($json.rationale != null && $json.rationale !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.rationale).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.negotiation_tips != null && $json.negotiation_tips !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.negotiation_tips).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.talking_points != null && $json.talking_points !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.talking_points).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.common_objections != null && $json.common_objections !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.common_objections).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.counter_arguments != null && $json.counter_arguments !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.counter_arguments).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.escalation_trigger != null && $json.escalation_trigger !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.escalation_trigger).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.escalation_contact != null && $json.escalation_contact !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.escalation_contact).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.requires_approval_below != null && $json.requires_approval_below !== undefined) ? $json.requires_approval_below : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.importance_level || 5 }},
  {{ $json.is_deal_breaker || false }},
  {{ $json.is_non_negotiable || false }},
  {{ $json.display_order || 1 }},
  {{ $json.is_active !== false }},
  {{ ($json.range_context != null && $json.range_context !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.range_context).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.source_quote != null && $json.source_quote !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.source_quote).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ ($json.quality_flags != null && $json.quality_flags !== undefined) ? "'" + String($json.quality_flags).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : "'[]'::jsonb" }}
)
RETURNING rule_id

UPDATE company_playbooks
SET 
  status = CASE 
    WHEN {{ $('Process Claude Response').first().json.extraction_confidence ?? 0 }} >= 0.7 AND {{ !$('Validate Extracted Rules').first().json.hasQualityIssues }} THEN 'parsed'
    ELSE 'review_required'
  END,
  ai_confidence_score = {{ $('Process Claude Response').first().json.extraction_confidence ?? null }},
  rules_extracted = {{ $('Process Claude Response').first().json.total_rules_extracted ?? 0 }},
  playbook_summary = '{{ ($('Process Claude Response').first().json.playbook_summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, " ") }}',
  parsing_error = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE playbook_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.playbookId }}'::uuid
RETURNING *

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Parse started', playbookId: $('Validate Input').first().json.playbookId }) }}
